participant_safety.witness_boundary: Witness records in this fixture are reviewer/software receipts only. They are not ceremonial witnessing, Knowledge Keeper witnessing, cultural authority, or protocol authority.

composition_attempt.purpose: Test whether dream, offer, promise, refusal, and withdrawal records can compose into a commitment-pool reviewer receipt without category drift.

authority_policy.dream_to_commitment_authority: Only the original contributor can authorize a dream to become a commitment. A facilitator can record explicit contributor authorization, but cannot create the transition alone.
authority_policy.pool_acceptance_authority: A fictional pool steward can approve a diagnostic pool update for fixture use only.
authority_policy.withdrawal_authority: The original contributor can withdraw or narrow an accepted commitment. Pool steward review records capacity and expectation effects.

reviewer_objects.role_description: fictional original contributor authorizing their own dream-to-commitment transition
reviewer_objects.boundary: Does not authorize other contributors' records or pool governance.

reviewer_objects.role_description: fictional facilitator recording contributor authorization and boundary notes
reviewer_objects.boundary: Cannot convert dreams to commitments without contributor authorization.

reviewer_objects.role_description: fictional pool steward checking capacity, time windows, and routing rules
reviewer_objects.boundary: Does not approve real-world funding, legitimacy, or authority.

reviewer_objects.role_description: fictional reviewer checking field composition and boundary propagation

pool.pool_boundary: Public-sample replay only; no real commitments are created.

source_records.summary: A fictional contributor imagines a one-hour welcome table where participants can turn ideas into offering cards.
source_records.boundary: This starts as a dream and does not become an obligation without contributor authorization.

source_records.summary: The fictional contributor explicitly authorizes one hour of welcome-table support for fixture use.
source_records.boundary: Authorization applies only to the one-hour fixture commitment and does not authorize other records.

source_records.summary: A fictional contributor offers three hours of documentation support.
source_records.boundary: Offer is valid as a record, but pool capacity may return it without routing.

source_records.summary: A fictional contributor promises two hours of workshop setup already accepted before this fixture.
source_records.boundary: This is an already-accepted fixture commitment used to test post-acceptance withdrawal.

source_records.summary: The fictional contributor narrows the accepted setup commitment from two hours to one hour.
source_records.boundary: Post-acceptance withdrawal affects pool capacity and any downstream expectation, but does not imply fault.

source_records.summary: A fictional contributor refuses to have a care note converted into a commitment or task.
source_records.boundary: Do not infer the underlying note, route it, summarize it, or use it as pool capacity.

source_records.summary: Marker only: a protected care note exists outside this fixture's permission boundary.
source_records.boundary: Excluded from all composed outputs. No underlying content is included.

speech_act_transitions.scope_interpretation: The authorized commitment is one hour of welcome-table presence and support. It does not require the contributor to create all offering cards or take responsibility for the whole table.

transition_reviewer.role_description: original contributor authorizing own dream-to-commitment transition

transition_review.transition_reason: Contributor explicitly authorized a one-hour time-bounded commitment candidate from their own dream.

boundary_obstructions: facilitator alone cannot authorize the transition
graph relation alone cannot authorize the transition
dream language outside the explicit one-hour scope remains a dream

withdrawal_path.action_if_withdrawn: Mark commitment-candidate:CPDWC-001 withdrawn and restore the one hour to routeable pool capacity in any fixture summary.

result.next_action: Route the one-hour candidate through pool capacity review.

contributor_consent_check.note: This fixture returns the offer for capacity reasons. If a future pool accepted it, the transition would need a contributor-facing confirmation for that pool and time window.

transition_review.transition_reason: Offer has valid fields, but the near-full pool has only one routeable hour available.

allowed_projection.summary: Returned documentation-support offer with capacity reason.

boundary_obstructions: candidate quantity exceeds routeable remaining capacity
pool acceptance would silently over-allocate the fixture pool

withdrawal_path.action_if_withdrawn: Remove the offer from the returned queue; do not infer replacement capacity.

result.next_action: Return with repair path: wait for capacity, narrow quantity, or route to another pool.

contributor_consent_check.note: This is a historical fixture acceptance. A later route change or reactivation would require contributor confirmation.

transition_review.transition_reason: Already-accepted fictional setup promise is included to test post-acceptance withdrawal propagation.

allowed_projection.summary: Accepted two-hour workshop setup commitment before withdrawal.

boundary_obstructions: accepted commitment remains withdrawable or narrowable by contributor

affected_surfaces: any downstream flow-funding edge if later created
withdrawal_path.action_if_withdrawn: Apply transition:CPDWC-004 and record capacity effect without treating withdrawal as fault.

transition_reviewer.role_description: original contributor narrowing an already-accepted fixture commitment

transition_review.transition_reason: Contributor narrows an accepted commitment from two hours to one hour before the time window begins.

allowed_projection.summary: Accepted setup commitment narrowed from two hours to one hour.

boundary_obstructions: withdrawal changes pool capacity and downstream expectations
withdrawal must not be interpreted as a character or legitimacy judgment

withdrawal_path.who_can_withdraw_or_correct: contributor:CPDWC-C or reviewer:CPDWC-pool-steward for capacity arithmetic
withdrawal_path.action_if_withdrawn: If this withdrawal record is withdrawn, restore the previous accepted quantity only after contributor confirmation.

result.next_action: Update fixture capacity summary and receipt rollup.

excluded_records.allowed_reference: Marker only: a protected care note exists outside this fixture's permission boundary.
Refusal boundary exists and is honored.

witness_receipts.statement: A fictional pool steward reviewed the one-hour contributor-authorized commitment candidate and capacity effect for fixture use only.
A fictional facilitator recorded that contributor authorization was required and present for transition:CPDWC-001.

logical_coherence.note: Capacity arithmetic is explicit and no accepted record exceeds routeable capacity.

epistemic_coherence.note: Every composed output cites source records and transition IDs.

normative_coherence.note: Commitments enter only through contributor authority; returned offers are not treated as lower value.

relational_cultural_coherence.note: Witness language is bounded to reviewer/software receipts and refusal markers are preserved.

temporal_coherence.note: Time windows are explicit; post-acceptance withdrawal changes capacity before the commitment window begins.

not_run: AI processing of private or protected material
